title: Add home page with navigation icons and home button

requirements.summary: Create a new home page component that serves as the landing page with a welcoming introduction to the bed bug educational app
acceptanceCriteria: Home page component is created as a new React component
Home page displays when users first visit the application
Page includes welcoming content about the app's purpose

file_operations.description: Create a new HomePage component that displays a welcoming hero section introducing the bed bug educational app, explaining its purpose of helping users identify, prevent, and treat bed bug infestations. Include a brief overview of available features and resources. Use the generated bed bug icons from frontend/public/assets/generated/bed-bug-icon.dim_128x128.png and frontend/public/assets/generated/bed-bugs-quick-tip-icon.dim_128x128.png as visual elements in the hero section.

Update the hash-based routing logic to display the HomePage component when the hash is empty or '#home'. Ensure HomePage renders before EducationalContent for the default/home route while preserving existing routes for '#qr-code' and '#location-finder'.

requirements.summary: Add navigation icons on the home page representing each main section with clear visual indicators
acceptanceCriteria: Each main section has a distinct icon displayed on the home page
Icons are clickable and navigate to their respective sections
Visual design clearly indicates these are starting points for users
Icons are organized in a logical, scannable layout

file_operations.description: Add a navigation grid section to HomePage displaying seven main section icons (scanner, identify, habitats, prevention, treatment, guides, find local help) with clear labels and visual hierarchy. Use shadcn/ui Card components for each navigation item. Include appropriate icons from lucide-react (Camera for scanner, Search for identify, Home for habitats, Shield for prevention, Activity for treatment, BookOpen for guides, MapPin for find local help). Make each card clickable and style them to be visually distinct as entry points. Use the existing generated pest icons from frontend/public/assets/generated/ for additional visual context where relevant.

requirements.summary: Implement smooth scroll behavior when clicking navigation icons to scroll to the corresponding section
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking an icon smoothly scrolls to the target section
Scroll animation is smooth and not jarring
All section navigation icons correctly scroll to their targets

file_operations.description: Add click handlers to each navigation icon that use hash-based navigation to navigate to the corresponding section (e.g., #scanner, #identify, #habitats, #prevention, #treatment, #guides, #findLocalHelp). These hash values should match the tabs in EducationalContent.tsx. Use the existing useHashRoute hook for navigation. The browser's native smooth scroll behavior will handle the animation when navigating to these hash-based routes.
Add CSS rule for smooth scroll behavior: `html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }` to enable smooth scrolling animations when navigating between sections via hash links.

requirements.summary: Add a persistent home button icon in the header that allows users to return to the home page from any section
acceptanceCriteria: Home button icon is visible from all pages and sections
Clicking the home button navigates back to the home page
Button placement does not conflict with existing header elements (Location Finder, Help, Share buttons)
Icon is clearly recognizable as a home navigation element

file_operations.description: Add a Home button icon (using lucide-react Home icon) positioned to the left of the existing Location Finder button in the header. The button should navigate to '#home' or clear the hash to return to the home page using the existing useHashRoute hook. Style it consistently with the other header buttons and ensure it is visible and accessible from all pages. Add appropriate ARIA labels for accessibility.
